name: Seared Ahi Served with Floral of Asian Greens (Hl)
recipeIngredient: 6 ounces ahi or yellow fin tuna
recipeInstructions:
1. Season the ahi with salt and pepper.
2. Wrap the nori sheet around the ahi.
3. Saute in a teflon pan until seared, turning off the heat when done.
4. Floral Greens:
1. Blanch the tomato and peel it.
2. Hollow out the inside of the tomato.
3. Arrange enoki mushrooms, warabi sprouts, and Asian greens in the hollowed-out tomato.
5. Dressing:
1. Mix red wine vinegar, olive oil, shallots, and parsley in a bowl.
2. Pour the dressing over the floral greens.
6. Serve one portion.
Yield: 1 serving
Nutritional information: 370 calories, 13 grams of fat.
